title: lyciodes retusum
intro: Lyciodes retusum, also known as the Lyciodes plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Lyciodes retum are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. Lyciodes retusum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
